task_description: Conduct a due diligence investigation of Stripe as a potential payment processing partner for our fintech startup.

input_data.context: Our fintech startup is evaluating Stripe as our primary payment processing infrastructure partner. We need a comprehensive due diligence report covering their financial stability, leadership, competitive positioning, and any risks. We plan to process $50M annually through their platform and need to ensure long-term viability and regulatory compliance.
